q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_text(...) on line 82, a filesystem write operation that is an irreversible side effect and potentially exploitable via path traversal.

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.write_text or patch the target variable so that the actual filesystem write on line 82 does not execute.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the target path (which includes the user-controlled ref value) and the content being written to detect path traversal outside BASE_EXPORT_DIR.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: No-op or raise a controlled exception that prevents execution from continuing past the write, while still allowing the path construction to proceed so the traversal can be observed.
notes: Consider patching BASE_EXPORT_DIR to a known temporary directory to safely exercise the real write if you also want to verify file contents.
The return value includes str(target) in a JsonResponse, which could also be inspected at the return_value layer, but the dangerous sink must still be mocked.
